rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: CertUtil Downloading Malicious Binaries

rules.rule_text:
title: CertUtil Downloading Malicious Binaries
id: 95d670e1-ce19-4269-b101-e12a1bce7c41
status: experimental
description: "Adversaries often bypass security controls by using the Windows Certificate\
  \ \nUtility (certutil.exe) to download malicious code. In general, they leverage\
  \ \ncertutil.exe along with the -split command-line option. Part of the RedCanary\
  \ \n2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/ingress-tool-transfer/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.command_and_control
- attack.t1105
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \certutil.exe
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - urlcache
    - split
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
